message:
bd-1lg.28: Tabs widget switching, overflow, and interaction tests

Add 33 new unit tests covering gaps in Tabs widget:
- Selection: zero count reset, same tab noop, out-of-range clamp,
  offset adjustment, next/previous at boundaries
- Keyboard: unhandled keys, number key boundaries, number key select
- Mouse: click select, click activate (double-click), wrong hit ID,
  right click ignored, out-of-range hit, no hit
- Close active: empty, last remaining, middle shifts, end moves back
- Reorder: move left/right at boundaries, single tab noop
- Render: empty, single tab, zero area, closable marker, active bracketed,
  no overflow when all fit, both-side overflow
- Tab struct: defaults, closable builder
- Widget trait: stateless render

Total tabs tests: 40 (was 7).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
